_comment: AIC (AI Consumption) pricing config. EDIT THESE RATES to match your contract / provider list prices. All token rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Cache-aware: Anthropic-style caching bills cache WRITES above the input rate and cache READS well below it. 'copilotMultiplier' is the GitHub Copilot premium-request multiplier used to derive credits from user turns. Model keys are matched by longest-prefix against the telemetry model name (e.g. 'claude-opus-4.8' -> 'claude-opus'). 'usdPerCredit', when set to a number, adds a monetary credit-equivalent (cost / usdPerCredit).
